enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Orey Or Ooril, the lyrics beautifully express the feelings of love and yearning, reflecting the emotional landscape of the characters in Baahubali 2. The song serves as a poignant reminder of the deep connections that bind individuals together, even amidst challenges. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Overall, this track encapsulates the essence of love, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Orey Or Ooril from Baahubali 2 is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With MM Keeravani's enchanting composition, this song transports listeners to a realm of deep emotions and nostalgia. Experience the magic of this beautiful track that resonates with the heart and soul.
stanzaMeanings: In one town, in one kingdom, will my heart speak of love?
In one house, will one sound support me?
Is it a command to come? Will it be caught in the pearl? If caught, will I be Devasena?
With a sense of belonging, will my truth rise in my heart?
Will my flag rise, oh beautiful one?
In the front of the enemy, will I place kisses everywhere?
Will the lips show magic, oh beloved?
Oh ho ho... oh ho ho, has the time changed? Oh ho ho... oh ho ho, like fire, will it be about me?
Like a flame, will Devasena be?
In one town, in one kingdom, will my heart speak of love?
In one house, will one sound support me?
In my heart, is there a thorn? Without it, will I also move forward? Speaking, will I be Devasena?
